title: trilobulina crenata
intro: Trilobulina crenata is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the yellow or orange-flowering acanthus. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America and the Caribbean. Trilobulina crenata is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, to take advantage of its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting infections.
